strategy: He takes +30% from Fire and resists Ice 74%. Hit with Fire.

Every positive charm or aura you cast (pet casts too) gets a Weakness slapped on the receiver. Counter it by blading and hitting in the same round, using Indemnity, or cleansing the Weakness before your hit.
Every third round he summons one of several spider minions on a random wizard, so the board fills over time. Bring an AoE option or burst him before spiders pile up.
Blade efficiently (same round as your hit to dodge the Weakness), and land a Fire nuke.
cheatNotes: Every positive charm or aura you cast earns a Weakness on the receiver. Blade and hit the same round, use Indemnity, or cleanse before swinging.
Pet-cast charms also trigger the Weakness. Mind your pet's buffs.
Every third round he summons a spider minion on a random wizard. Expect the board to fill; AoE or burst him fast.
